summary: CRITICAL SECURITY FIX VERIFIED: SuperAdminHelpPage now correctly redirects tenant users to /admin/help. All 4 test scenarios passed. The security fix in SuperAdminHelpPage.js (lines 29-31) using Navigate component works correctly.
passed_tests: ✓ CRITICAL FIX: Tenant user navigating to /admin/super-admin-help is REDIRECTED to /admin/help
✓ After redirect, tenant sees TenantHelpPage content (data-testid='tenant-help-page')
✓ Tenant cannot see Super Admin SaaS content after redirect
✓ Super Admin can still access /admin/super-admin-help normally
✓ Super Admin sees both 管理员手册 and 使用手册 links in sidebar
✓ Tenant Help Page (/admin/help) renders correctly for tenant users
✓ 使用手册 link IS visible in tenant sidebar under 系统参数 group (requires scroll to bottom)
✓ Tenant does NOT see 管理员手册 link (correct)
✓ Tenant does NOT see SaaS商家管理 link (correct)
✓ Clicking 使用手册 link navigates to /admin/help correctly
critical_code_review_comments: The security fix using Navigate component with replace prop is the correct React Router approach
The isSuperAdmin check (user?.role === 'admin' && !user?.tenant_id) is consistent with other parts of the app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security fix for /admin/super-admin-help verified. The previous iteration_21 security issue is now resolved. The 使用手册 link visibility concern from iteration_21 was actually a non-issue - the link exists and works, it's just at the bottom of a long sidebar requiring scroll.

fix_verification.issue_from_iteration_21: Tenant users could access /admin/super-admin-help and view all Super Admin SaaS content
fix_verification.fix_applied: Added isSuperAdmin check in SuperAdminHelpPage.js with Navigate redirect to /admin/help
fix_verification.verification_method: Playwright automation testing tenant user direct URL access to /admin/super-admin-help
